verses.text: God calls Moses, Aaron, and the elders up, but Moses alone draws near. Approach. God sets degrees of nearness.
God calls Moses, Aaron, and the elders up, but Moses alone draws near. Approach. God sets degrees of nearness.
The people answer, 'All... will we do'; Moses writes the words and builds an altar. Pledged. They covenant to obey.
The people answer, 'All... will we do'; Moses writes the words and builds an altar. Pledged. They covenant to obey.
Moses sprinkles the blood of the covenant on the people. Blood of covenant. The bond is sealed with blood, foreshadowing Christ.
Moses sprinkles the blood of the covenant on the people. Blood of covenant. The bond is sealed with blood, foreshadowing Christ.
Moses sprinkles the blood of the covenant on the people. Blood of covenant. The bond is sealed with blood, foreshadowing Christ.
Moses sprinkles the blood of the covenant on the people. Blood of covenant. The bond is sealed with blood, foreshadowing Christ.
The elders see the God of Israel and eat and drink, yet are not harmed. Vision. Grace lets sinful men behold God and live.
The elders see the God of Israel and eat and drink, yet are not harmed. Vision. Grace lets sinful men behold God and live.
The elders see the God of Israel and eat and drink, yet are not harmed. Vision. Grace lets sinful men behold God and live.
God calls Moses up to receive the tables of stone and the law. Summoned. He goes to bring back God's word.
God calls Moses up to receive the tables of stone and the law. Summoned. He goes to bring back God's word.
God calls Moses up to receive the tables of stone and the law. Summoned. He goes to bring back God's word.
The glory of the LORD rests on Sinai; Moses enters the cloud forty days. In the cloud. He dwells in God's presence to receive the pattern.
